title: Oscars Predictions via Feinberg Forecast: Scott's Final Picks
text: Scott Feinberg's final predictions for the 2026 Academy Awards, published by Hollywood Reporter, included his projected order of finish for Best Film Editing. Feinberg's predictions ranked: One Battle After Another (Warner Bros.) with Andy Jurgensen as his top pick; Sinners (Warner Bros.) with Michael Shawver; F1 (Apple/Warner Bros.) with Stephen Mirrione; Sentimental Value (Neon) with Olivier Bugge Coutté; and Marty Supreme (A24) with Ronald Bronstein & Josh Safdie. Feinberg predicted the editing work on One Battle After Another would secure the top position, followed by the crime drama Sinners. His analysis emphasized that the editing winner typically indicates the Best Picture trajectory. Feinberg's forecast proved accurate when One Battle After Another won Best Editing at the ceremony on March 15, 2026.
